name: Rocky Road Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 14-inch pizza pan with cooking spray.
3. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions and spread batter evenly over bottom of prepared rimmed pizza pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes.
5. Spread marshmallow fluff evenly over brownie layer.
6. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and walnuts.
